sglang.title: Use Optional with None default
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Have it work on python 3.9
Modifications

Checklist

[+] Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
[+] Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
[+] Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

sglang.title: Misc fix for min_p_sampling, --cuda-graph-bs
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Support --cuda-graph-bs so you can specify the batch size to capture the cuda graph.
Fix merge_batch for min_p_sampling
Add more utility functions and remove redundant code.

sglang.title: Update int8 gemm config
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Follow-up of #2752. Fix config for SM89 and verified on L40.
N = 4096, K = 8192
A100:
   batch_size  vllm int8 gemm  sgl-kernel int8 gemm
0         1.0     1492.574684           1638.220172
1        16.0    24688.941272          26028.650279
2        32.0    48451.603134          50567.71

sglang.title: Host memory pool for hierarchical caching
sglang.author: xiezhq-hermann
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is one of the breakdown PR of the hierarchical caching proposal.
Modifications

Interfaces for data transfer between host and devices.
MemoryStateInt and functions specify memory state transfers.
MLATokenToKVPoolHost that backs up KV caches in a MLATokenToKVPoo.

Checklist

 Format y

sglang.title: Disable math eval on nightly CI temporarily
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Fix nightly accuracy tests
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Adjust the threshold of gsm8k. Print a summary to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
Disable human eval because it is always a timeout. cc @zhyncs
Remove duplicated model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct

sglang.title: [eagle2] fix end check when target model verify
sglang.author: jjjjohnson
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
After  eagel2 target model verify, the accepted tokens might be EOS token, need to check each appended new token. Then free kv cache of the unaccepted tokens.
Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Gui

sglang.title: Improve linear.py to load sharded weights & remove the dependency of Parameters from vllm
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
remove the dependency of Parameters from vllm
improve the weight loading of linear.py

Co-authored-by: SangBin Cho rkooo567@gmail.com

vllm.title: [V1][Doc] Update V1 support for `LLaVa-NeXT-Video`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: With #11685 merged, this comes for free and thus is just a doc update.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Comprehensively test and fix LLaVA-NeXT feature size calculation
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds an optional test that brute forces through many image sizes to ensure that the LLaVA-NeXT feature size calculation is indeed correct. I have updated our feature size calculation based on the latest version of TGI which passes the optional test.

vllm.title: [doc] add doc to explain how to use uv
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [V1] Support audio language models on V1
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds V1 coverage for audio language models supported on vLLM (qwen2-audio and ultravox).
The PR itself has all the required changes and is functional, but should be merged only after #11685 due to the missed preprocessing step.

vllm.title: [doc] update how pip can install nightly wheels
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Doc] Add note to `gte-Qwen2` models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: FIX #11801 (comment)

vllm.title: [optimization] remove python function call for custom op
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: in eager mode, every layer needs to call the silu_and_mul python function, and it seems redundant. we can bypass the function call directly to reduce overhead.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] update the prefix for qwen2
vllm.author: jiangjiadi
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There exists a KeyError: 'layers.0.self_attn.qkv_proj.weight' when loading a partially quantized qwen2 model, where the MLP layers are quantized but the attention layers are not. The problem lies in the incorrect prefix within the qwen2 model. According to the current code, the prefix for each layer

vllm.title: [Doc]Add documentation for using EAGLE in vLLM
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adding documentation for using EAGLE in vLLM.
#11126

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Significant performance drop on CPUs with --num-scheduler-steps > 1
vllm.author: DamonFool
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Significant performance drop was observed on CPUs with --num-scheduler-steps > 1.
This is because multi-step scheduling has not been supported on CPUs.
It would be better to disable it on CPUs util it is fully supported.
Thanks.

vllm.title: [Doc] Group examples into categories
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implements suggestion from #11645 (comment)

Creates three categories: Online Inference, Offline Inference, Other
Nests categories inside Examples to reduce space consumed in the sidebar
Add description to each index page (Examples, Online Inference, Offline Inference, Other)
Add missing capitalisat

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix image input for Pixtral-HF
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Misc] sort torch profiler table by kernel timing
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This commits sorts torch profiler print table by total kernel timings for easier profiling.

vllm.title: Remove the duplicate imports of MultiModalKwargs and PlaceholderRange…
vllm.author: WangErXiao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Remove the duplicate imports of MultiModalKwargs and PlaceholderRange in scheduler.py, as they are only used for type hints.

vllm.title: Fixed docker build for ppc64le
vllm.author: npanpaliya
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixed vllm build on ppc64le.
FIX #11616

vllm.title: [OpenVINO] Fixed Docker.openvino build
vllm.author: ilya-lavrenov
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Alternative and more simple fix for the issue #11670 (comment) with Dockerfile.openvino building

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add checks for LoRA and CPU offload
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Current LoRA does not support CPU offload, so add checks to prevent errors like those reported in #11748.
PS： This is a temporary solution - we should support this feature in the future.
FIX #11748

vllm.title: [Docs] reorganize sponsorship page
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is not yet the desired final state but we can iterate on it a bit later. I want to add some levels of "tiers" and "referral" to each sponsor.
This PR adds Novita as sponsor and highlight Anyscale for Slack Sponsorship.

vllm.title: [Bug] Fix pickling of `ModelConfig` when RunAI Model Streamer is used
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #11819
This PR fixes the issue by avoiding assigning S3Model as an attribute of ModelConfig.

vllm.title: [misc] improve memory profiling
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previous, we use torch.cuda.memory_stats()["allocated_bytes.all.current"] as the memory taken by PyTorch, and torch.cuda.mem_get_info()[1] - torch.cuda.mem_get_info()[0] as the memory cost reported by cuda. The diff is treated as  non-torch memory.
However, I find this is incorrect:
import torch

de

vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Old urls still work, but we can update and use the short url now.

vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For more details, open the Copilot Workspace session.
